summary: Frontend-only Bikemates marketing site tested end-to-end via Playwright against public URL. All 23 routes render (200 + non-empty). Mock auth (signup + login) works and redirects to /dashboard with user's name; localStorage persistence verified. Dashboard tab toggle (Rider/Owner), quick actions toasts, and logout to home all work. All primary nav testids present (nav-bike-rental, ride-sharing, features, how-it-works, safety, pricing) and route correctly. Nav 'More' dropdown exposes all 10 items (About, Blog, Careers, Campus Ambassador, Refer & Earn, Insurance, Partner Colleges, Support, FAQ, Contact, Press Kit). All hero buttons clickable; hero-download-app routes to /signup (visuals-only). Forms tested: contact-submit, career-submit (Apply scroll works with career-apply-0..5), ambassador-submit, support-submit, partner-submit, footer-newsletter-submit — each shows a success toast. Refer & Earn copy-referral shows toast. Pricing has 5 signup CTAs. 404 page renders and 'Back to Home' works. FAQ accordion expands on both home (home-faq, 6 items) and /faq page (8 items, aria-expanded toggles). No pageerror/console errors captured.

ui_bugs.component: Dashboard chart (Your spending saved / Earnings overview)
ui_bugs.issue: Bars are not visually rendering in the h-48 flex container in the current viewport screenshot. Month labels (Jul-Dec) show but bar rectangles appear absent/invisible. Likely CSS: outer flex uses items-end with inner wrapper height:100% which collapses percentage-based bar height; recommend giving the intermediate wrapper an explicit non-percent height or using items-end on the direct bar parent.
Title is still 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of a Bikemates-branded title. Update in /app/frontend/public/index.html for SEO/brand.

action_items: Fix dashboard bar chart rendering — ensure bars are visible (adjust flex heights, remove intermediate height:100% wrapper or set explicit min-height on bars).
Update document title in /app/frontend/public/index.html from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to a Bikemates brand title.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard bar chart uses nested flex containers where the intermediate wrapper is height:100% and the bar inside uses percentage height — this reliably fails to show bars in some flex contexts; simpler markup with direct bar div in items-end container is preferable.

All interactive elements have data-testid in kebab-case — excellent testability. Nav 'More' dropdown items include a testid with '&' (nav-more-refer-&-earn) which is unusual but functional; consider slugifying to 'refer-earn'.
test_credentials: Mock client-side auth — any email/password (used student@college.edu / test1234 and any@x.com / any123).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only app. Base URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. No backend/API endpoints exist. All 23 routes verified rendering; auth mock via localStorage; all named forms show sonner toasts; nav dropdown 'More' revealed via click. Only outstanding minor items: dashboard bar chart visual + page <title>.
